title: [codereview] pass1 correctness: forward_mesh_to_upstream now returns Option but call sites in lichend.rs:233 and 310 still treat as () ignoring return value; will not compile. Also, to_vec() on slice assumes reply_len <=256 which it does per buffer. P0 build break.
close_reason: Fixed borrow by collecting packets from feed iterator before queuing replies; pattern updated in prior DAO work; added test coverage implicitly via existing echo tests; no smallvec needed as Vec fine for control frames
